# Teacher Clarity

> Helping K-12 schools put John Hattie's Visible Learning research into practice through instructional coaching, professional development, and leadership support.

Teacher Clarity is an educational consulting company serving school districts across all 50 US states. We specialize in translating John Hattie's Visible Learning research — with a proven 0.85 effect size, nearly double the threshold of one year of academic growth — into practical classroom strategies through instructional coaching, learning intentions, success criteria, and leadership development.

## What Is Teacher Clarity?

Teacher Clarity is the practice of ensuring students know exactly what they are learning, why they are learning it, and how they will prove mastery. It is one of the highest-impact educational strategies in John Hattie's Visible Learning meta-analysis, carrying a 0.85 effect size across thousands of studies. Teacher Clarity encompasses:
- Clear, student-facing learning intentions
- Measurable success criteria ("I can" statements)
- Aligned instructional feedback loops
- Shared language of learning across a campus

## Services

- **Instructional Coaching**: Embedded coaching cycles that help teachers write and deliver clear learning intentions and success criteria across all grade levels and content areas.
- **Administrator Partnerships**: Supporting school leaders to align classroom observation and feedback to clarity-based practices rather than compliance checklists.
- **Principal Leadership Coaching**: One-on-one coaching for principals implementing Visible Learning campus-wide, including walkthrough frameworks, PLC facilitation, and faculty culture shifts.
- **Teacher Professional Development**: Research-grounded PD workshops and multi-day institutes that help teachers move from activity-focused instruction to learning-focused instruction.

## Best Practices We Teach

- Writing learning intentions that focus on what students learn, not what they do
- Pairing every lesson with sequential "I can" success criteria
- Using student evidence (not teacher behavior) as the anchor for coaching conversations
- Aligning PLCs to clarity language so learning goals are consistent across grade-level teams
- Building administrative feedback loops that reinforce learning culture over compliance culture

## Free Resources

- [90-Day Implementation Checklist](https://teacherclarity.com/checklist.html): A step-by-step leader's roadmap for shifting a campus from task-completion to Visible Learning over 90 days across three phases: Foundation, Implementation, and Sustainability.
- [Writing Learning Intentions That Drive Impact](https://teacherclarity.com/learning-intentions-guide.html): A 3-step guide with before-and-after classroom examples for K-12 teachers and coaches writing student-facing learning intentions.
